---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
# Load packages and data
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))

predictors_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
```

# Predictor distributions
```{r distributions}
# Categorical
apoe_hist <- all_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = apoe)) +
  geom_bar(stat="count") + 
  labs(title = "APOE Categories in PREVENT-AD", 
       x = "APOE Category",
       y = "Count")

fhx_hist <- all_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = family_history)) +
  geom_bar(stat="count") + 
  labs(title = "PREVENT-AD Family History", 
       x = "Family History",
       y = "Count")

cat_hist <- apoe_hist | fhx_hist
cat_hist

# Continuous
cogd_plot <- all_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_cogd)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth=2) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "CogDrisk Scores in PREVENT-AD",
       x = "CogDrisk Score",
       y = "Density")

libra2_plot <- all_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = score_libra2)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth=2) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "LIBRA2 Scores in PREVENT-AD",
       x = "LIBRA2 Score",
       y = "Density")

grs_plot <- all_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GRS)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), bins=20) +
  geom_density(col="red") +
  labs(title = "GRS in PREVENT-AD",
       x = "GRS",
       y = "Density")

cont_plot <- cogd_plot | libra2_plot | grs_plot
cont_plot
```

# Checking for colinearity
```{r}
summary(all_dat$score_cogd)
hist(log(all_dat$score_cogd))

cor.test(all_dat$score_cogd, all_dat$score_libra2)
```
